title: BRIDGES TO CHANGE - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY OFFICE BRIDGES TO CHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers transitional housing, treatment, and supportive services for individuals recovering from addiction. Programs are led by peer mentors. Intensive outpatient (IOP) and outpatient substance use disorder treatment are available at multiple locations. 707 Main Street Suite 220 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more infomation FEES: Varies by service. OHP accepted for treatment services. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Wasco, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus Line 33: Stop ID 3727, 8096 Bus Lines: 35, 99, 79 Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Ex-Offender Halfway Houses Mentoring Programs * Substance Use Disorder Issues Sober Living Homes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY OFFICE
